<!-- Battery Pack Aadhaar System (BPAS) - Mobile App Prototype Configuration -->

This workspace contains a premium React + TypeScript web application prototype for the Battery Pack Aadhaar System (BPAS) - an EV Battery Aadhaar Cybersecurity Platform.

## Project Overview
- **Technology**: React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
- **Features**: 16+ fully connected screens with enterprise design
- **Design**: Tesla + Apple + Microsoft Defender style
- **Purpose**: Production-ready interactive prototype

## Key Screens
1. Splash & Login (multi-step authentication)
2. Dashboard (battery metrics & quick actions)
3. Battery Identity (digital identification)
4. QR Verification (authentic/fake/tampered detection)
5. Cybersecurity Dashboard (Zero Trust monitoring)
6. Security Scanning (8-module analysis)
7. AI Battery Health (degradation prediction)
8. Digital Battery Passport (lifecycle documentation)
9. Ownership Transfer (blockchain-verified)
10. Service History & Incident Timeline
11. Emergency Lock & Profile Management
12. Admin Dashboard (fleet analytics)
13. AI Chatbot (24/7 support)

## Development Commands
- `npm install` - Install dependencies
- `npm run dev` - Start dev server (port 3000)
- `npm run build` - Production build
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint
- `npm run type-check` - TypeScript type checking
